titleStmt.title: SII 26.393: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 393. (A.R. No. 372 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of a nandā lamp for use in the sanctum sanctorum of the temple of Tiruppulippagavadēvar in Śiṟṟiṅgūr, a brahmadēyam in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Malāḍu alias Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu by a certain Kayiṟūr Pichchaṉ Araiśaṉ of Āṉattar Śiṟuveṇṇainallūr (?) in Ēḻūr-nāḍu who was also the Kiḻāṉ of Tirumuṉaippāḍi. It is stated that he endowed a sum of 8(7/8) Kaḻañju of poṉ for this purpose and the same was received by the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple who had agreed to carry out the object of the endowment for ever.
Also records the gift by the same donor 80 palam in weight of metal, weighed by the balance called Tirumāltirupāṭṭak-kōl, for the (making of) the nandā lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvanacakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉ muṉṟāvatu malāṭāṉa jananātavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu
brahmadeyam ciṟṟiṅkūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruppulippakavadevar koyilil civabrāhmaṇa- rom Ittevar tirumunnāḻikaiyil tiru
viḷakkuc cantirātittavar Erivatākat tirumuṉaippāṭikkiḻāṉe ḻurnāṭṭu Āṉattār ciṟuveṇṇainalluḻāṉ kayiṟūr piccaṉ Araicuvai catta
kkum Ivaṉ pakkal nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭa cempaipoṉ Eṇkaḻaiñce mukkāle Araikkāluṅ kaikkoṇṭu Ittiruviḷakkuc
celuttak kaṭavomāṉom civabrāhmaṇarom Itu panmāheśvararakṣai Ittirunun=tā viḷakku niṉṟerikaikku veḷān kaiṟūr piccanaracu Iṭṭa tirumāl tirupāṭṭak kolāl Eṭai Eṇpatiṉ palam Itu panmāheśvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.393 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
